# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "vmCount": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 2,
      "minValue": 1
    },
    "vmNamePrefix": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "devvm"
    },
    "adminUsername": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "azureuser"
    },
    "adminPassword": {
      "type": "secureString",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Required for Windows VMs or if SSH key is not used."
      }
    },
    "authenticationType": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "password",
      "allowedValues": [
        "password",
        "sshPublicKey"
      ]
    },
    "adminPublicKey": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "SSH RSA public key for Linux VMs when authenticationType is sshPublicKey."
      }
    },
    "osType": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Linux",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Linux",
        "Windows"
      ]
    },
    "vmSize": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Standard_B2s"
    },
    "vnetName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "dev-vnet"
    },
    "subnetName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "default"
    },
    "vnetAddressPrefix": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "10.0.0.0/16"
    },
    "subnetAddressPrefix": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "10.0.0.0/24"
    },
    "imagePublisher": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Canonical"
    },
    "imageOffer": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "0001-com-ubuntu-server-jammy"
    },
    "imageSku": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "22_04-lts-gen2"
    },
    "imageVersion": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "latest"
    },
    "windowsImagePublisher": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "MicrosoftWindowsServer"
    },
    "windowsImageOffer": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "WindowsServer"
    },
    "windowsImageSku": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "2022-datacenter-azure-edition"
    },
    "windowsImageVersion": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "latest"
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "nsgName": "devvm-nsg"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups",
      "apiVersion": "2023-09-01",
      "name": "[variables('nsgName')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "properties": {
        "securityRules": [
          {
            "name": "Allow-RDP",
            "properties": {
              "priority": 1000,
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "access": "Allow",
              "direction": "Inbound",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "*",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "3389"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Allow-SSH",
            "properties": {
              "priority": 1010,
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "access": "Allow",
              "direction": "Inbound",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "*",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "22"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks",
      "apiVersion": "2023-09-01",
      "name": "[parameters('vnetName')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('nsgName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "addressSpace": {
          "addressPrefixes": [
            "[parameters('vnetAddressPrefix')]"
          ]
        },
        "subnets": [
          {
            "name": "[parameters('subnetName')]",
            "properties": {
              "addressPrefix": "[parameters('subnetAddressPrefix')]",
              "networkSecurityGroup": {
                "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('nsgName'))]"
              }
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "copy": {
        "name": "publicIpCopy",
        "count": "[parameters('vmCount')]"
      },
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses",
      "apiVersion": "2023-09-01",
      "name": "[format('{0}{1}-pip', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1))]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Standard"
      },
      "properties": {
        "publicIPAllocationMethod": "Static"
      }
    },
    {
      "copy": {
        "name": "nicCopy",
        "count": "[parameters('vmCount')]"
      },
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces",
      "apiVersion": "2023-09-01",
      "name": "[format('{0}{1}-nic', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1))]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName'))]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', format('{0}{1}-pip', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1)))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "ipConfigurations": [
          {
            "name": "ipconfig1",
            "properties": {
              "privateIPAllocationMethod": "Dynamic",
              "subnet": {
                "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName'))]"
              },
              "publicIPAddress": {
                "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', format('{0}{1}-pip', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1)))]"
              }
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "copy": {
        "name": "vmCopy",
        "count": "[parameters('vmCount')]"
      },
      "type": "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines",
      "apiVersion": "2023-09-01",
      "name": "[format('{0}{1}', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1))]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', format('{0}{1}-nic', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1)))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "hardwareProfile": {
          "vmSize": "[parameters('vmSize')]"
        },
        "storageProfile": {
          "imageReference": {
            "publisher": "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Linux'), parameters('imagePublisher'), parameters('windowsImagePublisher'))]",
            "offer": "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Linux'), parameters('imageOffer'), parameters('windowsImageOffer'))]",
            "sku": "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Linux'), parameters('imageSku'), parameters('windowsImageSku'))]",
            "version": "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Linux'), parameters('imageVersion'), parameters('windowsImageVersion'))]"
          },
          "osDisk": {
            "createOption": "FromImage",
            "managedDisk": {
              "storageAccountType": "Premium_LRS"
            }
          }
        },
        "osProfile": {
          "computerName": "[format('{0}{1}', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1))]",
          "adminUsername": "[parameters('adminUsername')]",
          "adminPassword": "[if(or(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Windows'), equals(parameters('authenticationType'), 'password')), parameters('adminPassword'), json('null'))]",
          "linuxConfiguration": "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Linux'), if(equals(parameters('authenticationType'), 'sshPublicKey'), createObject('disablePasswordAuthentication', true, 'ssh', createObject('publicKeys', createArray(createObject('path', format('/home/{0}/.ssh/authorized_keys', parameters('adminUsername')), 'keyData', parameters('adminPublicKey'))))), createObject('disablePasswordAuthentication', false)), json('null'))]",
          "windowsConfiguration": "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Windows'), createObject('provisionVMAgent', true, 'enableAutomaticUpdates', true), json('null'))]"
        },
        "networkProfile": {
          "networkInterfaces": [
            {
              "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', format('{0}{1}-nic', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1)))]"
            }
          ]
        }
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "vmPublicIPs": {
      "type": "array",
      "value": "[array(range(0, parameters('vmCount')))]",
      "copy": {
        "count": "[parameters('vmCount')]",
        "input": {
          "vmName": "[format('{0}{1}', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), add(copyIndex(), 1))]",
          "publicIpResourceId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', format('{0}{1}-pip', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), add(copyIndex(), 1)))]"
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
